_comment: Duplicate (series, series_number) groups that lint_data.py should NOT treat as blocking ERRORs, because the correct numbering is genuinely convention-dependent and awaits an owner decision. Each excused group still surfaces as a non-blocking WARN with its reason. Add an entry as {table, series, series_number, reason}; remove it once the convention is decided and the data fixed, so the position reverts to a blocking ERROR. Currently empty: the Foundation (internal chronology) and Black Company (The Silver Spike counted at #4) numberings were decided and applied on 2026-07-06.
